positive: A stunning, intricate celestial biome mandala design, featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and abstract geometric constellations interconnected by glowing cosmic vines. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, creating a harmonious, circular motif suitable for apparel. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with vaporwave cosmic aesthetics. Color direction: Deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant cyan, and glowing coral highlights against a midnight black background. Details should include crystalline structures, delicate glowing runes, and sweeping, symmetrical wave patterns. Clean silhouettes and strong contrast are mandatory for optimal print transfer. Highly detailed, vector style, 8K quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, grainy, dirty, bokeh, noise, jpeg artifacts, multiple people, cropped, messy edges
